mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM im_friend_relation WHERE uid = #{uid} AND friend_id = #{friendId} AND relation_status = 1
SELECT * FROM im_friend_relation WHERE uid = #{uid} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_friend_relation (id, uid, friend_id, user_name, friend_name, relation_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{uid}, #{friendId}, #{userName}, #{friendName}, #{relationStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM im_friend_relation WHERE uid = #{userId} AND friend_id IN
#{id}", "
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM im_friend_relation WHERE uid = #{uid} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
